content:
# Synthetic Data Generation

**Summary**: The creation of artificial datasets to train and validate machine learning models when real data is scarce.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-almarzooq|Almarzooq, 2023]] used synthetic-data-generation to create a large, high-quality training set for the neural networks.

## Key Results and Findings

- A custom engine was developed to generate 1D Earth models with varying lithologies (clastic, carbonate, salt) and wavelets (Klauder, Ormsby, Ricker). ([[2023-almarzooq|Almarzooq, 2023, p. 48]])
